sharepoint.name: GitHub Foundations Study Material.docx
sharepoint._comment: Personal SharePoint/OneDrive identifiers redacted before publishing to a public repo. Restore your own values locally.

_comment: docx_path is the default (foundations) doc. The 'courses' map points each course to its own local Word doc; add Copilot screenshots to the copilot doc and run: python3 update_quiz.py --docx '<copilot doc>' --course copilot. Point each path at your OneDrive-synced copy (auto-updates) or a downloaded copy you refresh.
